executives.name: Susan Heystee
executives.background: Susan Heystee has served as a member of our Board since May 2021. She previously served as Senior Vice President of Global Automotive Business at Verizon Connect and held leadership roles at Telogis and Novell.

board_of_directors.name: Carl Bass
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Bass has served as a member of our board of directors since December 2021. Mr. Bass served as the President and Chief Executive Officer of Autodesk, Inc. from 2006 to 2017.

board_of_directors.name: Susan Heystee
board_of_directors.background: Susan Heystee has served as a member of our Board since May 2021. She previously served as Senior Vice President of Global Automotive Business at Verizon Connect and held leadership roles at Telogis and Novell.
